name: ai
description: Daily technology and AI news outputs.

steps.name: organize
steps.prompt: Organize the raw AI news for {date}. Use `python3 {root}/fetch_news.py --seen-keys news` to inspect prior seen keys, skip repeats, read `{root}/ai/{date}.md`, rewrite `{root}/ai/{date}.md` into the categorized Chinese Markdown format, and write `{root}/ai/{date}.json` as a flat JSON array with only title, summary, url, and source fields. Do not commit or push. After writing, rerun `python3 {root}/daily_pipeline.py run --date {date} --source ai`.
